name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
In stock!!️
Latest Miss Daisy chain bag from the flagship store🆕Iconic oversized rattan pattern, classic lettering charm👏, paired with soft lambskin for an elegant and fashionable look🙋, making the whole bag more exquisite. Multiple interior compartments and card slots, beautiful yet highly practical😍
size:22*12.5*4cm
